calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Trustee'S First Acccount
Off Calendar Mar-25-2024 Off Calendar

Status Report And Petition For Termination Of Trust And Discharge Of Bond
Off Calendar Aug-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: Mercy Hall appearing via zoom for CPT institute (petitioner).
Susan Gordon appearing via zoom for Hercules Moss.

The Court stated that it cannot terminate the trust which is a master pooled trust funded with assets of other beneficiaries with special needs. Status report and petition for termination of trust and discharge bond is taken under submission. Status on filing of trustee's bond and executed copies of joinder documents and Status of filing of inventory and appraisal are ordered off calendar.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.
